# CANDIDATE: ENTRY_EXPERIMENT.MISSED_WEEK_OPTIMIZATION

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** parameter_optimization
**Status:** DRAFT (AWAITING_SWEEP_RESULTS)

## Hypothesis

Entry parameters (confidence thresholds, time gates, trigger combinations) on a specific "missed week" can be optimized to capture J-anchor winners while avoiding losers. The sweep targets entry-level discrimination rather than exit optimization (which V14E_PARAM_SWEEP_26K already covers).

## Mechanism

1. **Missed week identification:** Analyze which week had suboptimal entry parameters
2. **Parameter sweep:** Vary entry_confidence_min, entry_time_start, entry_time_end, min_triggers_required
3. **J-anchor validation:** Compute edge_capture delta vs baseline for each combo
4. **Top combo selection:** Highest edge_capture with aggregate_sharpe > 0.5

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** $25K+ for full qty; $1K paper realizes ~14%
2. **Sample bias:** Single-week optimization (high overfit risk) — requires OOS validation
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (full 16-month window or walk-forward)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS on top-3 J days
5. **Failure modes:** Overfit to missed week; entry params too tight → miss future winners
6. **Concentration:** Unknown — depends on sweep results

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] entry_experiment.py located
- [ ] Sweep completes with ≥1 OP-16 compliant combo (edge_capture ≥ 771)
- [ ] J-anchor validation shows positive delta
- [ ] Walk-forward OOS ratio ≥ 0.50
- [ ] Real-fills pass on top-3 J days

## Confidence

3 / 10 — Cannot assess without sweep results. High risk of single-week overfit.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

- Complements #12 V14E_PARAM_SWEEP_26K (exit optimization) with entry optimization
- Distinct from #15 SNIPER_VIX_TREND_STAGE2 (new trade class)
- May conflict if entry tightening blocks existing winner-capturing triggers
